---
title: "Animation Gallery"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
    css: style.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, results = "asis", message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table))
```

<div class="site-wrapper">

  <header class="hero">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">animint2</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Statistical<br><em>Animation</em><br>Gallery</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Interactive statistical visualizations built with R and animint2</p>
    <div class="hero-rule"></div>
  </header>

  <section class="meta-bar">
```{r stats}
meta <- fread("meta.csv")
n   <- nrow(meta)
cat(paste0(
  '<div class="meta-stat"><span class="meta-num">', n, '</span>',
  '<span class="meta-label">Visualizations</span></div>',
  '<div class="meta-stat"><span class="meta-num">',
  length(unique(sub("/.*", "", meta$viz_owner_repo))),
  '</span><span class="meta-label">Contributors</span></div>',
  '<div class="meta-stat"><span class="meta-num">R</span>',
  '<span class="meta-label">Language</span></div>'
))
```
  </section>

  <main class="gallery">
```{r gallery}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(meta))) {
  row      <- meta[i, ]
  repo_key <- gsub("/", "_", row$viz_owner_repo)
  img_path <- paste0("repos/", repo_key, ".png")
  owner    <- sub("/.*", "", row$viz_owner_repo)
  repo     <- sub(".*/", "", row$viz_owner_repo)
  viz_url  <- paste0("https://", owner, ".github.io/", repo, "/")
  repo_url <- paste0("https://github.com/", row$viz_owner_repo)
  num_pad  <- formatC(i, width = 2, flag = "0")

  cat(paste0(
    '<article class="viz-card">',
      '<a class="card-thumb" href="', viz_url, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">',
        '<img src="', img_path, '" alt="', row$title, '" loading="lazy"/>',
        '<div class="card-overlay">',
          '<span class="overlay-cta">View Live &#8599;</span>',
        '</div>',
      '</a>',
      '<div class="card-body">',
        '<span class="card-index">', num_pad, '</span>',
        '<h2 class="card-title">', row$title, '</h2>',
        '<div class="card-links">',
          '<a href="', viz_url,  '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Live Demo</a>',
          '<a href="', repo_url, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-ghost">Repository</a>',
          '<a href="', row$source, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-ghost">Source</a>',
        '</div>',
      '</div>',
    '</article>'
  ))
}
```
  </main>

  <footer class="site-footer">
    <p>Built with <strong>animint2</strong> &middot;
       <a href="meta.csv">Download meta.csv</a>
    </p>
  </footer>

</div>
